description: SIRI source catalog for the siri feeder. Each entry is a pollable SIRI endpoint or provider profile. Choose which entries run with the SIRI_SOURCES environment variable: a comma-separated list of names, or '*' for all; when unset, every entry whose 'enabled' flag is true is polled. Point SIRI_SOURCES_FILE at a copy of this file to maintain your own catalog. Secrets may be written as ${ENV_VAR} and are expanded from the environment at load time, so keys never live in this file. The legacy SIRI_PROVIDER / SIRI_URL / SIRI_API_KEY / SIRI_OPERATORS / SIRI_DATA_TYPES inline configuration still works and takes precedence when SIRI_URL is set or SIRI_PROVIDER is not the default 'bods'.

sources.name: uk-bods-bulk-archive
sources.description: UK Bus Open Data Service (BODS) public bulk SIRI Vehicle Monitoring archive. The default bulk archive is public; export BODS_API_KEY or SIRI_API_KEY if your BODS deployment requires a key.

sources.name: trafiklab-sweden
sources.description: Samtrafiken / Trafiklab Sweden API-key-protected SIRI Vehicle Monitoring endpoint for regional operators. Add 'trafiklab-sweden' to SIRI_SOURCES to enable.

sources.name: key-protected-siri-template
sources.description: TEMPLATE - copy this entry for a key-protected SIRI provider, replace siri_url with the operator's documented endpoint, export SIRI_API_KEY in the runtime environment, set headers / operators / data_types as required, and set enabled to true.
